topic: The hair I pull from my shower drain is a color I have never had.
title: The Hair In My Drain Was The Wrong Color | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The hair I pulled from my shower drain was never my color.
scenes.image_prompt: A clump of pale hair tangled over a metal shower drain, water pooling, dim bathroom light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I lived alone in a ground floor flat with one bathroom.
scenes.image_prompt: A small tiled shower stall with a round chrome drain, frosted glass door, low gray light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My hair is short and black. Always has been.
scenes.image_prompt: A comb with a few short dark hairs resting on a sink edge, dim warm light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the drain coughed up long strands of pale blonde.
scenes.image_prompt: Long blonde hair strands wrapped around a shower drain cover, standing water, cold light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I dropped it on the tile.
scenes.image_prompt: A wet clump of light hair lying on wet bathroom tiles, droplets scattered, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every shower after, more of it. Always the same shade.
scenes.image_prompt: A drain cover clogged with pale hair, water backing up over white tile, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I bleached the pipes and ran scalding water for an hour.
scenes.image_prompt: Steam rising from a running shower over a chrome drain, water swirling, dim warm light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next morning the blonde returned, longer than any human hair.
scenes.image_prompt: An impossibly long strand of pale hair coiled around a drain and across the tub floor, cold light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unscrewed the drain cover to look down the pipe.
scenes.image_prompt: A removed drain cover beside a dark open pipe hole in a shower floor, a screwdriver nearby, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The pipe was packed full of pale hair, still warm.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark drain opening stuffed with pale hair rising toward the surface, faint steam, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called a plumber. He refused to finish the job.
scenes.image_prompt: An abandoned plumber toolbox open on a wet bathroom floor, the drain exposed, gray light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The last tenant, he said, was a blonde woman never found.
scenes.image_prompt: A faded missing person flyer curling on a damp tiled wall, edges peeling, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
